title: Not on the Manifest
description: Rivet Row clerk refuses the party a pickled egg because the egg is not on the manifest. Character beat.

steps.text: The canteen was closed for intake, the clerk explained, because the egg the Chem Tech had requested was not on the manifest, and the manifest was the only authority in this building that mattered.

lines.speaker: Chem Tech
lines.text: You are holding the egg. I can see it from here.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Its physical presence is not in dispute.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Manifest revisions are submitted weekly. On Tuesdays. We are presently on Wednesday.

lines.speaker: Union Agitator
lines.text: So the egg is unreachable until next Tuesday.

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Technically, the egg is unreachable until Thursday of next week, as new manifest items are subject to a 48-hour posting requirement.

lines.speaker: Line Worker
lines.text: ...Can we have two eggs if we come back on Thursday of next week?

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.text: Two eggs would require a separate submission.

steps.text: The clerk nodded once and returned the egg to its drawer, where it would wait, on paper and off the manifest, for the week it was scheduled to exist.
